knownBugs.description: Any authenticated user can permanently destroy the shared team library with a single PUT
Open self-registration — no domain restriction
margin_percent=100 produces Infinity quote price
No rate limiting on Anthropic API routes
knownBugs.resolvedBy: TICKET-SSP-005 sha=d30d0f2 — ACTIVE. Note: in-memory; Upstash upgrade path documented.

knownBugs.description: Client-supplied library accepted without verification
Prompt injection via user fields — client-side sanitize only; system prompt exfiltration via extra JSON keys
History records stored/rendered without guardrail re-validation
library.js GET does not distinguish error types
configurations table missing explicit UPDATE/DELETE RLS policies
user_email not stored/fetched in history — all avatars show ??
knownBugs.resolvedBy: TICKET-SSP-011 sha=5833f52 — ACTIVE. Note: requires user_email column migration on configurations table.

knownBugs.description: sanitizeText mislabeled as security control

History search concatenates without null guards
Every cell edit triggers a full library PUT
deleteRow uses window.confirm with no undo
settings.js upsert return value not checked
